title: rudgea umbellata
intro: Rudgea umbellata, also known as the yellow-flowered Rudgea, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, including reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and aiding in the management of various skin conditions. Rudgea umbellata is often used in herbal preparations, such as infusions and tinctures, to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
